notes: v0.24.1 — Lobby overhaul. NEWS redesigned (no text overflow), SEASON 1 'Coming Soon', account LVL + XP bar moved into nick chip, animated lobby ship that flies + fires bullets (click to pick ship), modules strip with class LVL + 4 equipped slots, WALLET 2x2 panel (PULSE/SURGE/ENERGY/KEYS), mode flow refactored to overlays (PLAY/Change Mode → mode picker → submode picker for Practice → back to lobby), difficulty chip cycles in lobby, PLAY button starts the match directly.
